name: @fatedart/ui
description: UI components for Stellar Design System

scripts.build: tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/styles && cp "src/styles/typography.module.css" "dist/styles/typography.module.css" && cp "src/components/Button/Button.module.css" "dist/components/Button/Button.module.css" && cp "src/components/HeaderFooter/HeaderFooter.module.css" "dist/components/HeaderFooter/HeaderFooter.module.css" && cp "src/components/InputField/InputField.module.css" "dist/components/InputField/InputField.module.css"
